name: jelly-cursor
description: A jelly-like animated cursor with movement glow for VS Code.

jellyCursor.note.default: Use the command palette to install or uninstall the DOM cursor patch.
jellyCursor.note.description: This extension uses a VS Code workbench DOM patch for cursor animation.

jellyCursor.fastSpeed.description: Speed for the cursor corner closest to the movement direction.

jellyCursor.midSpeed.description: Speed for side corners of the jelly cursor.

jellyCursor.slowSpeed.description: Speed for the cursor corner opposite the movement direction.

jellyCursor.axisBias.description: How strongly horizontal or vertical movement affects corner speed selection.

jellyCursor.topEdgeBoost.description: Extra speed for the top two cursor points during mostly horizontal movement.

jellyCursor.minAlpha.description: Minimum alpha for the rendered cursor while the native cursor is blinking.

jellyCursor.cursorColor.description: Rendered cursor color. Leave empty to follow the native VS Code cursor color.

jellyCursor.glowColor.description: Cursor glow color. Leave empty to follow the rendered cursor color.

jellyCursor.glowOpacity.description: Maximum glow opacity while the cursor is moving.

jellyCursor.glowIntensity.description: Glow brightness multiplier while the cursor is moving.

jellyCursor.glowSize.description: Glow size around the cursor in pixels.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
